name: ipados-design
description: High-polish iPadOS design guidance for adaptive, desktop-class iPad apps.

interface.shortDescription: Design adaptive iPadOS apps with iPhone-level product polish.
interface.longDescription: Adds iPadOS product UX planning, adaptive layout guidance, split-view and windowing patterns, keyboard/pointer/Pencil interaction rules, templates, and simulator screenshot verification for iPad apps that match the quality of the iPhone experience.
defaultPrompt: Adapt this iPhone UI for iPad.
